title: Worked Example - Counting Numbers from 1 to n

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we use nested while loops to count numbers from 1 to `n` (user input). The outer loop controls the iterations, while the inner loop prints numbers from 1 to the current outer loop value, demonstrating how inner loops can generate sequences based on the outer loop's iteration.

---

sampleTestCases.output:
Counting from 1 to 1: 1 
Counting from 1 to 2: 1 2 
Counting from 1 to 3: 1 2 3
